mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store( owner_id, store_name, business_number, business_name, location, store_pic, store_tel, store_info ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeName}, #{businessNumber}, #{businessName}, #{location}, #{storePic}, #{storeTel}, #{storeInfo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET store_name = #{storeName}, location = #{location}, store_tel = #{storeTel}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, store_pic = #{storePic}, store_info = #{storeInfo} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, location, store_tel AS storeTel, business_number AS businessNumber, store_pic AS storePic, store_info AS storeInfo, state, holiday, notice FROM store WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (store_id, name, menu_info, price, menu_pic) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{name}, #{menuInfo}, #{price}, #{menuPic})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id AS menuId, name AS name, menu_info AS menuInfo, price, menu_pic AS menuPic FROM menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
